title: Avoid using octal escape sequences in regular expressions
description: Avoid using octal escape sequences in regular expressions as they can lead to unexpected behavior or errors.
message: Avoid using octal escape sequences in regular expressions
recommendation: Use hexadecimal or Unicode escape sequences instead.
why_is_this_an_issue: Octal escape sequences can lead to unexpected behavior or errors in regular expressions.
how_to_fix: Use hexadecimal or Unicode escape sequences instead.
